Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to feed into email content generation.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the DFC inventory database using the submitted vehicle specs to retrieve all stocked parts and identify gaps where no parts exist.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls a precise, live inventory picture in seconds rather than requiring a manual catalog search across multiple product lines.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the raw inventory results into a clean, structured catalog layout and flags missing inventory items clearly for Mark's review.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a professional, readable output that would otherwise require manual formatting, saving significant time on each catalog request.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, along with a brief summary of what was found and what is missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a finished, actionable catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of his request, replacing a process that previously took hours of manual work.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantities, on-order records, and in-transit shipments.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enriches the entire backorder list with real-time data in one pass, replacing the fragmented process of a dozen team members doing independent manual lookups.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Receives the enriched inventory data and updates each backorder line with its current status, flagging parts that have no viable source as dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a dynamic, prioritized action report that tells the team exactly where each part stands and which ones need escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, pre-written based on each part's status and expected availability.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the manual drafting of dozens of customer update emails per week, ensuring customers receive timely, accurate communication without burdening the team.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor listings by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles a comprehensive competitive catalog reference in minutes that would take days to build manually by visiting each site and recording data by hand.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor listings against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify coverage matches and gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has competitive coverage and where market opportunities exist, giving Dino a prioritized product gap analysis.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to target customers to gather demand data on specific two-piece rotor fitments not currently in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand signals from actual buyers to validate which product gaps are worth filling, replacing guesswork with data-driven prioritization.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and incoming customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, organized reference document that consolidates weeks of potential research into an immediately actionable catalog tool.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creative and copy fields for user-specified phrases or keywords flagged for review.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly surfaces every instance of a flagged phrase across the entire active ad library, a scan that would take hours to perform manually across multiple accounts.

Meta Investigation.action: Reviews the flagged ad results and formats them into a clean, organized list with the exact field, copy excerpt, and match context for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Produces a structured, easy-to-read flagged report that makes it simple for the team to assess and act without digging through raw export data.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the formatted flagged ad report to the relevant stakeholder, including each match with its exact location and copy context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a complete investigation result on demand without requiring the recipient to access any ad platform or run any manual search.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Pulls live performance data and ad details from active Meta and TikTok campaigns, making them available as context for conversational queries.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives users instant access to cross-platform ad data in a single interface, eliminating the need to toggle between Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager for answers.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Interprets natural language questions about paid channel performance and responds with data-backed answers, comparisons, and insights drawn from the live ad data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Enables any team member to get fast, accurate answers about paid performance without needing platform expertise or pulling manual reports.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts resume attachments, and routes each email into the processing workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every inbound application is captured and actioned automatically, so no candidate falls through the cracks during high-volume hiring periods.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF into an organized Drive folder structure, categorized by role and application date.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable archive of all applicant files, replacing scattered inbox attachments with a structured document library the team can reference anytime.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the relevant open role and assigns a decision of approved, denied, or pending based on role status and candidate fit.
Resume Bot.impact: Delivers consistent, bias-reduced screening decisions in seconds per applicant, dramatically cutting the time recruiters spend on initial resume review.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant with their score, decision, role, and filing details to a central dashboard, and places paused-role candidates in a dedicated Pending tab for future review.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a live, organized view of every application and its status, replacing manual tracking and enabling fast re-engagement when a paused role reopens.

summary: The pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents across the board — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week. On the progress front, the Paid Channel Chatbot moved to Completed this week, bringing even more of our automation stack into active, working status. Great momentum from the team as we continue pushing toward a fully automated marketing operation!
